label: Clinical Trials Guidance Documents
title: Clinical Trials Guidance Documents | FDA
text: Guidance documents listed below represent the agency's current thinking on the conduct of clinical trials, good clinical practice and human subject protection. Guidance documents are not binding for FDA or the public and should be viewed as recommendations unless specific regulatory or statutory requirements are cited. The page lists current clinical-trial-related guidance, including Processes and Practices Applicable to Bioresearch Monitoring Inspections, Informed Consent, Decentralized Clinical Trials for Drugs, Biological Products, and Devices, Electronic Systems, Electronic Records, and Electronic Signatures in Clinical Investigations, ICH E8(R1): General Considerations for Clinical Studies, and Risk-Based Approach to Monitoring of Clinical Investigations.

sections.heading: Example guidance listed
sections.text: Examples on the page include Informed Consent, Decentralized Clinical Trials for Drugs, Biological Products, and Devices, Electronic Systems in Clinical Investigations, ICH E8(R1), and Risk-Based Approach to Monitoring of Clinical Investigations.
